title: France's business elite warms to the far right
subhead: Leaders of France's largest companies are no longer shying away from meetings with the Rassemblement National's leaders, as they seek to influence the economic agenda of one of the leading contenders for the 2027 presidential election.

title: Apple CEO Tim Cook stepping down in September: 'It has been the greatest privilege of my life'
subhead: Cook will turn the title over to John Ternus, Apple’s head of hardware engineering, on September 1, while remaining involved with the Cupertino, California company as executive chairman.

subhead: Around 40 master paintings by artists such as Velázquez, El Greco and Zurbarán are on loan from New York's Hispanic Society of America.

title: Six months into Gaza ceasefire, phase two of Trump's 'peace plan' remains in limbo
subhead: The Israeli army has tightened its grip on the enclave and killed more than 750 Palestinians over the past six months. Humanitarian aid continues to fall short of needs, and negotiations over disarming Hamas have stalled.

Ireland, the weak link in Europe's defense
subhead: Irish neutrality, long seen as a guarantee of independence from its former British colonizer, has been eroding under European and Atlantic pressures. After decades of naval weakness, Dublin has committed to strengthening its navy.

title: France's housing crisis is straining relations between landlords and tenants
subhead: Tensions have risen at every stage of the landlord-tenant relationship amid a nationwide housing shortage.

title: From a South American frog to a Russian penal colony: How the poison epibatidine killed Navalny
subhead: This extremely powerful neurotoxin is secreted by a frog native to Ecuador. Although Western scientists discovered it in the 19th century, it wasn't synthesized until the 1990s. The neurotoxin appears to have particularly interested the Russian research institute responsible for synthesizing Novichok agents, used in poisonings.
byline: Audrey Lagadec,  Eric Dedier and  Rémi Ducasse
